signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Traffic was up across both channels and Google search queries remain positive. Guests are looking for our product, coming into our stores and visiting our e-commerce sites.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Markdowns were flat versus the prior year and better than expected.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: Our full-year revenue guidance acknowledges the uncertainty around the shorter holiday shopping season and the U.S. election in quarter four.
